e.p: What's your name?
e.m: Nói tên; Nói vị trí công việc (ngắn gọn).
e.h: My name is + [studentName]. I am a/an + job.
e.s: My name is [studentName]. I am a nurse.

e.p: Where do you work in the hospital?
e.m: Nói khoa/phòng; Nói ca làm việc (morning/afternoon/night).
e.h: I work in + department. I work the + shift + shift.
e.s: I work in the emergency department. I work the morning shift.

e.p: How long have you worked here?
e.m: Nói khi bắt đầu (Past Simple); Nói cảm giác về công việc hiện tại (one short feeling).
e.h: I started + time (Past Simple). I + feel + adjective.
e.s: I started two years ago. I feel proud of my work.

e.p: Who is your supervisor?
e.m: Nói chức danh người quản lý; Nói một việc bạn làm cho họ (ngắn).
e.h: I report to the + position. I + verb + task.
e.s: I report to the head nurse. I update her about patients.

e.p: What are your main tasks here?
e.m: Nêu 2 nhiệm vụ chính, mỗi nhiệm vụ 1 câu.
e.h: Use simple present: I check/I give/I assist...
e.s: I check patients' vital signs. I give medicines and record notes.

e.p: Hello, who are you?
e.m: Nói tên; Nói nghề nghiệp (ví dụ: nurse/doctor).
e.h: My name is + [studentName]. I am a + job.
e.s: My name is [studentName]. I am a nurse.

e.p: Which department are you from?
e.m: Nói khoa/phòng; Nói lý do ngắn bạn đến thăm (one short reason).
e.h: I am from + department. I am here to + verb.
e.s: I am from pediatrics. I am here to check your child.

e.p: What will you do now?
e.m: Mô tả 2 hành động sắp làm (dùng will/going to).
e.h: I will/I'm going to + verb; then + verb.
e.s: I will check your temperature. Then I will prepare the medicine.

e.p: Do you have any allergies?
e.m: Hỏi lại và nói bạn sẽ ghi chú nếu có (tập phản hồi ngắn).
e.h: Use short question response + I will note it.
e.s: Do you have any allergies? I will write them in your file.

e.p: How often will you visit?
e.m: Nói tần suất thăm (daily/once a day); Nói một điều bạn sẽ làm mỗi lần thăm.
e.h: I will visit + frequency. I will + verb each time.
e.s: I will visit once a day. I will check your wounds each time.

e.p: Excuse me, where is the radiology?
e.m: Chỉ vị trí ngắn (floor/direction); Nói liệu bạn có thể dẫn họ đến đó hay không.
e.h: It's on + floor/direction. I can/ can't + lead/help.
e.s: It's on the second floor near the elevator. I can show you the way.

e.p: Is the pharmacy open now?
e.m: Trả lời tình trạng mở/đóng (short); Nói giờ mở/đóng hoặc khi mở lại.
e.h: It is/It isn't open. It opens/closes at + time.
e.s: It is open now. It closes at 6 pm.

e.p: How can I get to the outpatient clinic?
e.m: Hướng dẫn 2 bước ngắn (ví dụ: go to X then turn Y).
e.h: Use 'Go to' and 'then turn'.
e.s: Go to the main lobby. Then turn left and walk past the information desk.

e.p: Where is the nearest restroom?
e.m: Nói vị trí ngắn và cho biết nếu có biển chỉ dẫn (yes/no).
e.h: It's + location. There is/there isn't a sign.
e.s: It's beside the cafe on the ground floor. There is a sign near the door.

e.p: Can I park near the emergency entrance?
e.m: Trả lời được phép hay không; Nêu lựa chọn khác nếu không được phép.
e.h: Use must/mustn't or can/can't and give alternative.
e.s: You can't park there; it's for ambulances. You can park in the visitor lot across the street.

e.p: What does the ICU look like?
e.m: Mô tả 1-2 chi tiết quan sát (ví dụ: máy móc, yên tĩnh).
e.h: Simple present: It has/It is + adjective.
e.s: It has many monitors and oxygen machines. It is quiet and clean.

e.p: How many beds are in your ward?
e.m: Nói số giường (short); Nói xem nó crowded hơn hay less crowded than others (comparative).
e.h: There are + number + beds. It is more/less + adjective + than + place.
e.s: There are ten beds. It is more crowded than the clinic.

e.p: Do you have a nurses' station?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Mô tả 1 việc bạn làm ở đó.
e.h: Use There is/There isn't and I + verb.
e.s: There is a nurses' station near the entrance. I update patient charts there.

e.p: Is there a waiting area for families?
e.m: Nói có/không; Nêu một tiện ích ở đó (ví dụ: chairs, water).
e.h: It has + noun(s).
e.s: Yes, there is a waiting area. It has chairs and a water dispenser.

e.p: Describe the pharmacy area briefly.
e.m: Nói 2 điều: nơi để thuốc và nhiệm vụ của nhân viên ở đó.
e.h: Use present simple: It stores/They check/They prepare.
e.s: It stores medicines on shelves. Staff prepare and check prescriptions.

d.t: Vai trò và công việc hàng ngày

e.p: What is your job here?
e.m: Nói chức danh; Nói 1 nhiệm vụ chính (short).
e.h: I am a + job. I + verb + noun.
e.s: I am a lab technician. I run tests for patients.

e.p: Tell me one routine you do every morning.
e.m: Nói một hành động lặp lại; Nói mục đích của hành động đó (short).
e.h: Use present simple: I + verb + to + verb.
e.s: I check patient charts every morning. I do it to track their progress.

e.p: Do you give medicines to patients?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nếu có, mô tả ngắn bạn sẽ làm gì (one action).
e.h: Yes, I + verb. / No, I don't + verb.
e.s: Yes, I give medicines at scheduled times. I record each dose in the chart.

e.p: Who helps you with heavy tasks?
e.m: Nêu người/nhóm hỗ trợ; Nói một ví dụ công việc họ làm.
e.h: Use They/He/She + help(s) + verb.
e.s: Orderlies help me with heavy tasks. They move patients and push beds.

e.p: What should you do if a patient feels worse?
e.m: Nói 2 bước ngắn bạn sẽ làm (alert/report/treat).
e.h: Use should + base verb and then + verb (Past/Present).
e.s: I should call the nurse in charge. I should monitor vital signs and report changes.

d.t: Thiết bị và vật tư y tế

e.p: What is this machine used for?
e.m: Nói tên máy (simple) hoặc chức năng ngắn; Nói ai dùng nó.
e.h: It is a + machine. It is used for + verb-ing.
e.s: It is a ventilator. It is used for helping patients breathe.

e.p: Do you have enough gloves and masks?
e.m: Trả lời đủ/không; Nêu nơi lưu trữ ngắn (where).
e.h: We have/We don't have. They are stored in + place.
e.s: We have enough gloves and masks. They are stored in the supply room.

e.p: How do you check a blood pressure device?
e.m: Mô tả 2 bước đơn giản để kiểm tra (each a sentence).
e.h: Use imperative or I + verb: Check/Make sure...
e.s: I check the cuff for damage. I make sure the device is calibrated.

e.p: Who orders new supplies?
e.m: Nói vị trí chịu trách nhiệm; Nói một hành động họ làm để đặt hàng.
e.h: Use present simple: The + position + orders + supplies.
e.s: The inventory manager orders new supplies. They call the vendor or place an online order.

e.p: What must staff do with expired medicines?
e.m: Nói bắt buộc (must) và mô tả hành động xử lý (one short action).
e.h: Use must + verb and then + verb phrase.
e.s: Staff must remove expired medicines immediately. They must return them to pharmacy for disposal.

d.t: Lịch làm việc và ca trực

e.p: When is your next shift?
e.m: Nói ngày/ca ngắn; Nói bạn sẽ làm gì chính trong ca đó.
e.h: My next shift is on + day or tomorrow at + time. I will + main task.
e.s: My next shift is tomorrow morning. I will check patients and give medications.

e.p: Can you swap a shift with me?
e.m: Trả lời đồng ý/không; Nêu điều kiện nếu có (one short điều kiện).
e.h: I can/I can't + unless/if + condition.
e.s: I can swap a shift with you if the manager approves. I will ask her today.

e.p: How often do you work night shifts?
e.m: Nói tần suất (e.g., once a week); Nói một khó khăn nhỏ khi làm night shift.
e.h: I work + frequency. It is + adjective + because + reason.
e.s: I work night shifts once a week. It is tiring because I sleep less.

e.p: What will you do before your shift starts?
e.m: Nêu 2 việc chuẩn bị bạn làm (each one sentence).
e.h: Use I will + verb and then + verb.
e.s: I will review patient notes before my shift. I will check my supplies and equipment.

e.p: Who covers if someone is sick?
e.m: Nói ai thay thế; Nói quy trình ngắn để báo cáo vắng mặt.
e.h: Use The + position + covers. We call/text + person/manager.
e.s: Another nurse covers the shift. We call the supervisor and update the roster.

d.t: Xử lý tình huống bệnh nhân

e.p: A patient is vomiting, what do you do first?
e.m: Nói hành động đầu tiên; Nói việc báo cáo (cho ai) sau đó.
e.h: I + verb first. Then I inform + person.
e.s: I help the patient sit up and give a basin. Then I inform the nurse in charge.

e.p: The patient has a fever, how will you record it?
e.m: Nói cách đo (one sentence); Nói nơi bạn ghi kết quả (second sentence).
e.h: I will measure + with. I will record it in + place.
e.s: I will measure temperature with a digital thermometer. I will record it in the patient chart.

e.p: Someone fell in the ward, what should you do?
e.m: Nói 2 bước cần làm ngay (immediate actions).
e.h: Use should + verb and then + verb.
e.s: You should call for help immediately. You should check for injuries and keep the patient still.

e.p: A family asks for a visiting time, how do you respond?
e.m: Nêu visiting hours; Nói một quy tắc ngắn (e.g., number of visitors).
e.h: Visiting hours are + time. Only + number + visitors allowed.
e.s: Visiting hours are from 2 pm to 5 pm. Only two visitors are allowed at a time.

e.p: If a device alarm sounds, what will you do?
e.m: Nói việc bạn sẽ làm ngay (one action); Nói ai bạn sẽ báo cáo nếu cần (second).
e.h: I will + verb. I will report to + position.
e.s: I will check the patient and the device immediately. I will report to the doctor if needed.

d.t: Giao tiếp qua điện thoại trong bệnh viện

e.p: Hello, is this the admissions desk?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói bạn có thể giúp gì (one short offer).
e.h: Yes, this is + place. I can help with + noun/verb.
e.s: Yes, this is admissions. I can help you with registration.

e.p: I need to make an appointment, can I book now?
e.m: Nói có thể/không; Nêu ngày khả dụng ngắn (one option).
e.h: You can/You can't. We have an opening on + day/time.
e.s: Yes, you can book now. We have an opening on Monday morning.

e.p: Please call me back about test results.
e.m: Xác nhận bạn sẽ gọi lại; Nói khi nào bạn sẽ gọi (short).
e.h: I will call you back + time. I will check results before calling.
e.s: I will call you back this afternoon. I will check the results first.

e.p: Who can I speak to about a bill?
e.m: Chỉ người/đơn vị phụ trách; Nói một hành động họ sẽ làm (one action).
e.h: Contact the + department/person. They will + verb.
e.s: Contact the billing department. They will check your invoice and explain charges.

e.p: Can I bring medication from home?
e.m: Trả lời yes/no; Nêu điều kiện ngắn nếu được phép.
e.h: You can/You cannot + unless/if + condition.
e.s: You can bring medication if the doctor approves. Please bring the original packaging.

d.t: Báo cáo ngắn cho bác sĩ

e.p: The patient's pulse is 110, what do you tell the doctor?
e.m: Nói con số nhịp tim; Nói một quan sát khác (ví dụ: fever or breathing).
e.h: Use present simple: The pulse is + number. The patient also has + detail.
e.s: The pulse is 110 beats per minute. The patient also has a fever.

e.p: I observed low oxygen levels, how will you report it?
e.m: Nêu số O2% nếu biết; Nói bạn đã làm gì ngay (one action).
e.h: Spoken: The O2 is + number%. I have + past action.
e.s: The oxygen level is 88%. I have given oxygen and notified the nurse.

e.p: Any change in patient's pain level?
e.m: Nói tăng/giảm và mức độ (short); Nói thuốc bạn đã cho nếu có.
e.h: Use increased/decreased + to + level. I gave + medicine.
e.s: The pain has increased to 7 out of 10. I gave the prescribed painkiller.

e.p: The wound looks infected, what will you say?
e.m: Mô tả dấu hiệu (one); Đề nghị một hành động (second).
e.h: It looks + adjective. We should + verb.
e.s: The wound looks red and swollen. We should start antibiotics and inform the doctor.

e.p: Patient is ready for discharge, how do you report?
e.m: Nói bệnh nhân ổn (short); Nêu kế hoạch xuất viện (place/time).
e.h: Use present simple: The patient is + adjective. They will be discharged to + place/time.
e.s: The patient is stable and alert. They will be discharged home this afternoon.

d.t: Chuẩn bị hồ sơ và giấy tờ

e.p: Do you have the patient's ID card?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu không có (one short action).
e.h: Yes, I have it. / No, I don't have it and I will + verb.
e.s: No, I don't have it right now. I will ask the family to bring it.

e.p: What information do we need for registration?
e.m: Nêu 2 thông tin cần thiết (name, DOB, etc.).
e.h: Use simple nouns: name; date of birth; address.
e.s: We need the patient's full name. We also need date of birth and contact number.

e.p: Where do you file the consent forms?
e.m: Nói vị trí lưu trữ; Nói ai ký trước (patient/guardian).
e.h: They are filed in + place. The + person + signs first.
e.s: They are filed in the patient records cabinet. The patient or guardian signs first.

e.p: Can a relative sign for the patient?
e.m: Trả lời yes/no; Nêu điều kiện ngắn (if guardian/ID).
e.h: Yes, if + condition. / No, unless + condition.
e.s: Yes, if they are the legal guardian and show ID. Otherwise the patient must sign.

e.p: Do we keep copies of test results?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói nơi lưu bản sao (short).
e.h: We keep copies in + place.
e.s: Yes, we keep copies of test results. They are stored in the patient's file.

d.t: Giao tiếp với người nhà bệnh nhân

e.p: Is my mother improving?
e.m: Trả lời ngắn về tình trạng (better/worse/stable); Nói một dấu hiệu cho biết (one sign).
e.h: She is + adjective. She shows + sign.
e.s: She is stable today. She shows less pain and better breathing.

e.p: Can we stay overnight with the patient?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nêu điều kiện ngắn (one rule).
e.h: You can/You cannot + unless/if + condition.
e.s: You cannot stay overnight in the ward. Visiting is allowed during visiting hours only.

e.p: Who can I contact for updates?
e.m: Nói vị trí/người liên hệ; Nói thời gian tốt nhất để gọi.
e.h: Contact the + position. Best time to call is + time.
e.s: Contact the nurse station for updates. The best time to call is after rounds at 10 am.

e.p: Do you recommend any home care after discharge?
e.m: Nêu 1 khuyến nghị cụ thể; Nói nếu họ should follow-up (yes/no).
e.h: Recommend: You should + verb. Follow-up: Yes/No, + when.
e.s: You should keep the wound clean and dry. Yes, please have a follow-up visit in one week.

e.p: Can we bring food for the patient?
e.m: Trả lời allowed/not allowed; Nói một lưu ý ngắn (e.g., hospital diet).
e.h: You can/You cannot + because + reason.
e.s: You can bring food, but follow the hospital diet. Please avoid strong-smelling or raw foods.

d.t: Tranh thủ thông tin chuyên môn ngắn

e.p: What is the patient's diagnosis?
e.m: Nói ngắn bệnh/chẩn đoán; Nói một hướng điều trị ngắn (one).
e.h: The diagnosis is + short phrase. Treatment is + noun/verb-ing.
e.s: The diagnosis is community-acquired pneumonia. Treatment is antibiotics and oxygen support.

e.p: Is the patient on any medication now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nêu tên 1 thuốc nếu có (simple).
e.h: Yes, they are on + medicine. / No, they are not on medication.
e.s: Yes, they are on paracetamol for fever. They also take a prescribed antibiotic.

e.p: Will the patient need surgery?
e.m: Trả lời will/ won't; Nêu thời gian dự kiến hoặc ghi chú short.
e.h: They will/They won't + verb. The surgery is planned for + time or not planned.
e.s: They will need minor surgery next week. The surgeon scheduled it for Monday.

e.p: How long is the recovery expected?
e.m: Nói khoảng thời gian (short); Nói một điều bệnh nhân should do during recovery.
e.h: Recovery is about + time. They should + verb.
e.s: Recovery is about two weeks. They should rest and avoid heavy work.

e.p: Who will review the lab results?
e.m: Nêu người chịu trách nhiệm; Nói khi họ sẽ xem (short).
e.h: The + position + will review. They will check them + time.
e.s: The attending doctor will review the lab results. He will check them after morning rounds.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giới thiệu và định vị trong bệnh viện

e.p: Can you introduce yourself and your department?
e.m: Nói tên (placeholder); Nói vị trí công việc; Nói khoa/phòng (total 2 câu: name+job/department combined).
e.h: My name is + [studentName]. I am a + job in + department.
e.s: My name is [studentName]. I am a nurse in the emergency department.

e.p: Where is the cardiology clinic and when is it open?
e.m: Chỉ vị trí ngắn; Nêu giờ mở/đóng (2 ý, 2 câu).
e.h: It's on + location. It opens at + time and closes at + time.
e.s: It's on the third floor next to the elevator. It opens at 8 am and closes at 4 pm.

e.p: How do you tell a visitor about visiting rules?
e.m: Nêu visiting hours; Nói một quy tắc về số người (2 ý).
e.h: Visiting hours are + time. Only + number + visitors allowed.
e.s: Visiting hours are from 2 pm to 5 pm. Only two visitors are allowed at once.

e.p: Introduce a short daily routine at work.
e.m: Nói 2 hoạt động chính bạn làm mỗi ngày (2 câu).
e.h: Use present simple: I + verb and I + verb.
e.s: I check patients' vital signs every morning. I update the charts and hand over to the doctor.

e.p: Give directions from main entrance to pediatrics.
e.m: Hướng dẫn 2 bước (go to X, then turn Y).
e.h: Use 'Go to' and 'then turn'.
e.s: Go to the main lobby and take the stairs to the second floor. Then turn right and follow the signs to pediatrics.

d.t: Ôn tập: Xử lý tình huống và báo cáo

e.p: A patient has chest pain, what will you do?
e.m: Nói hai hành động ngay lập tức (2 câu).
e.h: Use should/ will: I should/I will + verb.
e.s: I should call the doctor immediately. I will give oxygen and monitor the vital signs.

e.p: Report a high temperature to the doctor.
e.m: Nêu số nhiệt độ; Nói hành động bạn đã làm (2 ý).
e.h: The temperature is + number. I have + past action.
e.s: The temperature is 39°C. I have given paracetamol and informed the nurse.

e.p: Family asks about discharge time, what do you say?
e.m: Cho biết tình trạng ổn/không; Nói thời gian dự kiến (2 ý).
e.h: The patient is + adjective. They will be discharged + time.
e.s: The patient is stable now. They will be discharged tomorrow afternoon.

e.p: How do you handle missing supplies?
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ làm gì (report/order); Nói ai chịu trách nhiệm (2 ý).
e.h: I will report to + position. They will order + supplies.
e.s: I will report the missing items to the inventory manager. They will order new supplies today.

e.p: Summarize a patient's current status in two sentences.
e.m: Nêu tình trạng tổng quát; Nói một kế hoạch tiếp theo (2 câu).
e.h: Use present simple and will: The patient is + adjective. We will + verb.
e.s: The patient is stable and breathing well. We will continue monitoring and give medication as planned.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giao tiếp qua điện thoại và hồ sơ

e.p: Can I book an appointment for my child?
e.m: Xác nhận có thể/không; Nêu ngày giờ khả dụng (2 ý).
e.h: You can/You can't. We have an opening on + day/time.
e.s: Yes, you can book an appointment. We have an opening on Thursday at 9 am.

e.p: What documents are needed for admission?
e.m: Nêu 2 loại giấy tờ cần thiết (2 items).
e.h: Use simple nouns: ID card; insurance; referral.
e.s: We need the patient's ID card and insurance documents. A referral letter is helpful if available.

e.p: How do you notify a family about test results?
e.m: Nói cách liên lạc (phone/in person); Nói thời gian bạn sẽ gọi (2 ý).
e.h: I will call/by + method. I will call at + time.
e.s: I will call the family by phone. I will call after the doctor reviews the results this afternoon.

e.p: A relative wants to change visiting time, what do you say?
e.m: Trả lời có đổi được không; Nêu điều kiện hoặc thời gian thay thế (2 ý).
e.h: We can/can't change it. We can offer + alternative.
e.s: We cannot change the official visiting hours. We can offer a short meeting with the doctor at 5:30 pm.

e.p: Confirming discharge paperwork is ready, what do you tell the family?
e.m: Xác nhận ready/not ready; Nêu một bước họ cần làm (2 ý).
e.h: The paperwork is ready/not ready. Please + verb as next step.
e.s: The discharge paperwork is ready. Please come to the front desk to sign and pick up the documents.
